title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Fit Test on Voyager Free 60/60+ and Free 20 shows incorrect pass/fail icon or missing retry/cancel behavior when earbuds are placed in various positions
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 device to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the "Fit Test" option to launch the feature.
4. Place both earbuds correctly in your ears with a proper seal.
5. Observe the Fit Test result for each earbud.
6. Remove both earbuds and place them on a table (no seal).
7. Observe the Fit Test result for each earbud.
8. Place one earbud correctly in your ear and block the other earbud's speaker mesh (e.g., with your finger) to simulate a poor seal.
9. Observe the Fit Test result for each earbud.
10. When one or both earbuds show a "Fail" result, note the on-screen message.
11. Tap the "Cancel" button on the Fit Test result screen.
12. Observe the screen you are taken to after tapping Cancel.
expected: 1. Each earbud displays a green \"Good\" icon when properly sealed in the ear. 2. Each earbud displays a yellow \"Fail\" icon when not sealed (e.g., on a table or blocked). 3. When one or both earbuds fail, the message \"It looks like one or both earbuds need to be adjusted or try different size ear tip.\" is displayed. 4. The message is accompanied by \"Cancel\" and \"Retry\" buttons. 5. Tapping \"Cancel\" returns the user to the Device Settings Home screen (or Onboarding screen if applicable).
